T0221.title: Account Babysitting
T0221.definition: Proxy account farming is a service provided by black-market operators to keep accounts online in bulk and automatically execute tasks.
T0221.description: Operators use scripts or centralized control systems to maintain account activity on behalf of clients, automatically completing tasks such as check-ins, browsing, and liking to earn platform rewards or nurture accounts. This service is widely used in click-farm studios, where large numbers of accounts are operated to exploit platform incentives. Long-term proxy farming distorts platform ecosystem data and encroaches on legitimate user benefits.
T0221.usageExample: Proxy farming available, stable monthly income, just sit back and cash out.
